pr_description:
Set scrollPerPage default to true. 
When false, all system move by slides and not by pages. From navigation to pagination including navigateTo.

commit_message: feat(carousel): complete example for dynamic slides

pr_description:
References #184.

By resetting the autoplay interval when `goToPage`  is being called, we can accomplish this functionality. Because hovering over the element will reset the autoplay interval, it should only be run when `autoplayHoverPause` is false.

I also added changes to the properties passed to the *Autoplay* example in the vue-play demos. Because `autoplayHoverPause` has a default value of `true`, it rendered the component with the same properties as in *Autoplay, pause on hover*.
commit_message: feat(carousel): added tests confirming that the autoplay interval is reset according to options

pr_description:
Allow the height of the carousel to change based on its current content.
It adds 2 new additional props:
 * `adjustableHeight`
 * `adjustableHeightEasing`

## Description
This feature changes the height of the carousel based on its currently displayed content.

## Motivation and Context
Issue #97, similar feature exists "slick".
It can be useful to display carousel slides that have different heights.

## How Has This Been Tested?
Unit test
Browser tests using `vue-play`; Chrome, Firefox, Safari

commit_message:
#97 feat(props): add `adjustableHeight` prop

Allow the height of the carousel to change based on its current content.

pr_description:
<!--- Provide a general summary of your changes in the Title above -->
**Please merge either this or #343. (Only one of the two)**

## Description
<!--- Describe your changes in detail -->
Replacing the custom jade snapshot in [`tests/client/utils.js`](https://github.com/SSENSE/vue-carousel/blob/master/tests/client/utils.js) with [jest-serializer-vue](https://github.com/eddyerburgh/jest-serializer-vue) as discussed in #339.

- Add jest-serializer-vue to package.json
- Remove html2jade from package.json
- Delete tests/client/utils.js
- Replace all snapshot assertion to use jest snapshot assertion
- Some sync tests were converted to async tests in order to `$nextTick` for the dom changes to take place when Slide are loaded to the slots.

## Motivation and Context
<!--- Why is this change required? What problem does it solve? -->
<!--- If it fixes an open issue, please link to the issue here. -->
Hoping to lower the barrier for entry in using snapshots for unit tests.
Also making it easier to review pull requests with snapshot changes.

<!--- Include details of your testing environment, tests ran to see how -->
<!--- your change affects other areas of the code, etc. -->
Reviewed all snapshot changes are of the same structure as previous snapshots in jade.
Tests pass successfully.

commit_message:
feat(carousel): Count slides by custom tag name (#322)

* feat(carousel): Count slides by custom tag name

* fix(carousel): flush the slides left when they don't fill the width (#323)

* fix(carousel): Flush the slides left when they don't fill the width (#323)

When there are too few slides to fill the row, with scrollPerPage, the slides were flushed right instead of left.
By bounding maxOffest to a minimum of 0, the slides are aligned on the left-hand-side

Fix #323

* style(play): Use capitals in tests for consistency

* v0.16.1

* chore: build

* Rebuild

* Use Vue Test Utils, rebuild

* Discard change to package version

<!--- Provide a general summary of your changes in the Title above -->

## Description
Explanation of my approach in writing these test cases can be found [here](https://github.com/SSENSE/vue-carousel/issues/143#issuecomment-450297594).

Since master branch is latest now, I'm basing my work here off of master branch until a dev branch is created for upcoming release.

## Motivation and Context
<!--- Why is this change required? What problem does it solve? -->
<!--- If it fixes an open issue, please link to the issue here. -->
First attempt to increase code coverage (albeit to no success).
Would appreciate guidance and help by reviewing this.

## How Has This Been Tested?
<!--- Please describe in detail how you tested your changes. -->
<!--- Include details of your testing environment, tests ran to see how -->
<!--- your change affects other areas of the code, etc. -->
Main test here I think is checking for the computed value of `transitionStyle`.

I've also included the snapshot but I don't think this is effective here since `transition` css style is not included for some reason. Same applies to every other snapshots. Transition style just don't seem to get included in the snapshot.

Same applies to the snapshot before switching to jest-serializer.

```javascript
exports[`Carousel should apply custom slides per page when responsive param provided 1`] = `
".VueCarousel-wrapper
  .VueCarousel-inner(role='listbox', style='transform: translate(0px, 0); visibility: hidden; height: auto;')
|  
.VueCarousel-pagination(style='display: none;')
  ul.VueCarousel-dot-container(role='tablist')
// 
"
`;
```
[carousel.spec.js.snap @ v0.16.2](https://github.com/SSENSE/vue-carousel/blob/v0.16.2/tests/client/components/__snapshots__/carousel.spec.js.snap)
